name: Ringmaster
description: Dress rehearsal is over -- now it's showtime. Cogliostro Kettle, the Ringmaster Welcome, welcome, one and all — to a stage-lit extravaganza for the ages! Prepare to have your senses shattered! Your expectations demolished! Your Ancients smashed to ruins!

abilities.name: Dark Carnival Barker
abilities.description: Grants a charge whenever Ringmaster dies if he does not have a Souvenir. Grants one of three souvenirs per enemy hero death depending on selected facet. Enemy Death Radius: 925.

abilities.name: Funhouse Mirror
abilities.description: Creates an imperfect, proportionally distorted image of the Ringmaster. These images are illusions that deals a portion of Ringmaster's damage and receives additional incoming damage. Split Time: 0.2. Number of Illusions: 1. Damage Dealt: 28%. Damage Taken: 300%. Duration: 18.

abilities.name: Whoopee Cushion
abilities.description: Leaps forward and leaves behind a whoopsie-cloud that applies movement speed slow on affected enemy units for a period of time. All three selected souvenir abilities shares the same cooldown. Leap Distance: 400. Effect Radius: 250. Move Speed Slow: 30%. Slow Duration: 3. Aura Linger Duration: 0.

abilities.name: Strongman Tonic
abilities.description: All three selected souvenir abilities shares the same cooldown. Cast Range: 750. Base Str Bonus: 5. Str Bonus per Hero Level: 1. Max Str Duration: 4. Buff Duration: 8.

abilities.name: Unicycle
abilities.description: After a short preparation, Ringmaster mounts a speedy unicycle to ride around on. Crashing into trees destroys them and slows the unicycle. Attacking, taking damage above a threshold or crashing into units and other obstacles dismounts the rider. All three selected souvenir abilities shares the same cooldown. Preparation Duration: 0.5. Min Duration: 1.5. Max Duration: 10. Dismount Damage Threshold: 20.

abilities.name: Tame the Beasts
abilities.description: Twirls his whip up to a certain duration then cracks it. The longer the channel time, the lesser the radius. Deals damage and applies a caster-fear on affected enemy units. The longer the channel time, the greater the damage and the fear duration. Cast Range: 700. Max Channel Time: 1. Start Radius: 450 (451). End Radius: 200 (201). Magic Resist Bonus: (50%). Max Debuff Immune Duration: (1). Cooldown: 16/14/12/10. Mana Cost: 90/105/120/135.

abilities.name: Escape Act
abilities.description: Grants the volunteer within Ringmaster's Escape Act an animation speed bonus, both while being packed into the box, and while escaping from the box. Deals damage and releases Impalement Art daggers of its corresponding level with reduced range in all directions, centered around the affected allied unit. Cast Range: 600. Transformation Time: 0.5. Ring Radius: 500. Move Speed Bonus: 0%/8%/16%/24%. Magic Resist Bonus: 50%/60%/70%/80%. Slow Resist Bonus: 100%. Cooldown: 38/32/26/20. Mana Cost: 120.

abilities.name: Impalement Arts
abilities.description: Fires one of his daggers to a point-targeted location. Applies a brief movement speed slow and deals max health as damage if he strikes an enemy hero. Deals a flat damage per second to creeps instead. Cast Range: 2400. Projectile Width: 130. First Damage: 50 (125). Max Health as Damage per Second: 3.5%/4%/4.5%/5%. Move Speed Slow: 100%. Debuff Duration: 4 (5). Cooldown: 1/2/3/4. Mana Cost: 1.

abilities.name: Spotlight
abilities.description: Are you ready for your fifteen seconds? The limelight draws no distinction between infamy and fame. Cast Range: 1500. Effect Radius: 275. Miss Chance: 30%. Duration: 8. Aura Linger Duration: 0.3. Number of Spotlights: 3. Mana Cost: 50.

abilities.name: Wheel of Wonder
abilities.description: Upon reaching the point-targeted location, the wonder-wheel exerts an aura that deals damage and applies a movement speed slow. Cast Range: 1400 (1500). Min Travel Distance: 700. Knock Radius: 100. Knock Distance: 100. Knock Duration: 0.35. Effect Radius: 500 (600). Cooldown: 90/80/70. Mana Cost: 150/225/300.
